executiveSummary: This complaint details systematic breaches of the Companies Act and Trust Property Control Act by a syndicate of knowing conspirators. The primary conspirators are classified as Tier A Conspirators based on documentary proof of premeditated intent (mens rea).

complainants.names: Jacqueline Faucitt and Daniel James Faucitt
complainants.capacity: Directors, Shareholders, Oppressed Parties, and Trust Beneficiaries

tierA.name: Peter Andrew Faucitt
tierA.proofOfForeknowledge: Direct written admission of fraud awareness (SF10); authorized Rynette's system access.

tierA.name: Rynette Farrar
tierA.proofOfForeknowledge: Instructed creation of fraudulent financials; executed identity fraud (SF10).

tierA.name: Daniel Jacobus Bantjies
tierA.proofOfForeknowledge: Swore a false affidavit in court; six irreconcilable conflicts of interest.

tierC.name: De Novo Business Services / Marisca Meyer
tierC.assessment: Acted on instruction from Rynette Farrar. No evidence of foreknowledge.

centralMotive: The scheme constitutes a racketeering enterprise under POCA, aimed at seizing the ZAR 18.685 million payout from Ketoni Investment Holdings to the Faucitt Family Trust.

violations.violation: Failed to act with care, skill and diligence
Delinquent Director — gross abuse of position
Reckless Trading with intent to defraud

reliefSought: Declare Peter Andrew Faucitt a delinquent director under Section 162.
Refer criminal conduct to NPA and SAPS Commercial Crime Unit.
Initiate investigation into Tier C participants.
Order a forensic audit of all affected companies and the Faucitt Family Trust.
